meta.title: AI Dev 25 | Jeff Huber: Teach Chroma how to play Doom
meta.description:
Can a retrieval system learn to play Doom? In this lighthearted and insightful session, Jeff Huber, Founder and CEO of Chroma, explores the idea of instruction retrieval as a form of agentic memory—using Chroma in a unique and unexpected way.

With live code and practical examples, this talk is a great entry point for developers curious about retrieval in AI agents, and how memory systems can support more complex behaviors.

Keep building,
DeepLearning.AI
